personal.name: Eric Zhou
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.summary: Passionate software developer with experience building web applications, AI tools, and family-oriented products. Strong in Python, JavaScript, and cloud deployment.

highlights: Built family-os, a local CLI-based family task management tool (Python + SQLite)
Developed runnly-ai, a family collaboration workspace (Next.js + Supabase)
Created image-ocr, a macOS Vision framework OCR tool
Orchestrated AI agents (Claude Code, Hermes) for automated dev workflows
